headline: McKesson Corporation (MCK) is Attracting Investor Attention: Here is What You Should Know
summary: Zacks.com users have recently been watching McKesson (MCK) quite a bit. Thus, it is worth knowing the facts that could determine the stock's prospects.

headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on McKesson, Lowers Price Target to $925
summary: Barclays  analyst Glen Santangelo   maintains McKesson (NYSE:MCK) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $1050 to $925.
